debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2

G : Ω → SimpleGraph V
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hG : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m G p P
⊢ iIndepFun (fun e ω => e ∈ (G ω).edgeSet) P

by
  classical
  simpa [IsBinomialRandom, binomialRandom] using
